description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on push and pull request events for the main and vnext branches, as well as on page build and release created events. The workflow consists of two jobs: test and docs. The test job uses a matrix strategy to run on macos-latest, windows-latest, and ubuntu-18.04 with Python 3.7, 3.8, and 3.9. It checks out the repository, sets up Mambaforge, creates a conda environment, installs the package and its dependencies, runs tests with pytest, and uploads test results to Codecov. The docs job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the repository, sets up Mambaforge, creates a conda environment, installs the package and its documentation dependencies, builds the documentation with Sphinx, and uploads the HTML output as an artifact.
